docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$175.00); <STAMPED FILED BY FAX>; SERVED JAN-18-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAPTA INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER CAEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAPTA INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VIMI RAO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY CAEN, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT SAPTA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2024 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SAPTA INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAPTA INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAEN, CHRISTOPHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAPTA INC. $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-18-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER CAEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAPTA INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VIMI RAO, MEGAN CAI, AND DEVAN PALA. DEFENDANT STATED THEY WERE NOT ABLE TO FILE AND SERVE THE PLAINTIFF THEIR CROSS COMPLAINT AS THERE WAS PROBLEMS WITH THE FILING DATABASE AT THE SMALL CLAIMS WINDOW ON 5/1/24. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO ALLOW THE DEFENDANT TIME TO FILE AND SERVE THEIR CROSS COMPLAINT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY SAPTA INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CAEN, CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAPTA INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER CAEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAPTA INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VIMI RAO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SAPTA INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CAEN, CHRISTOPHER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR MAR-24-2024 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: PLAINTIFF. RECEIVED BY COURT AFTER HEARING DATE. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CAEN, CHRISTOPHER SAPTA INC.
